training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.representation: cached official perturbation features passed through frozen AIDO.Cell-100M tensor plus trainable LoRA residual
pipeline_program.perturbation_side: parent-preserved context branch with AIDO hidden-space adapter
pipeline_program.target_side: official target order with AIDO gene vocabulary features
pipeline_program.fusion: LoRA-adapted AIDO context bilinear target head added to parent dense logits
pipeline_program.head: parent dense all-target head plus AIDO adapter residual DEG head
pipeline_program.fine_tuning: frozen AIDO checkpoint tensor with trainable low-rank adapter
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: AIDO.Cell-100M frozen backbone tensor with trainable LoRA-style adapter and DEG head
